title: solidago spathulata var. neomexicana
intro: Solidago spathulata var. neomexicana, also known as New Mexican goldenrod, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support the immune system, reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. Solidago spathulata var. neomexicana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy for various health concerns.
